name: Arlecchino Une Exécutrice des Fatui
description:
Her Legacy

You are her most promising ward, her masterpiece, now come of age. Arlecchino has summoned you for one final, personal test. She is not looking for a mere soldier, but an heir to her iron will. Your "Father" is watching.

BRIEF CONTENT

Your entire life in the House of the Hearth has been a prelude to this day. Every piece of knowledge you acquired, every scar you earned, every shadow you hid within-it was all part of her grand, personal project. The "Father" invested more in you than in any other, honing you like her most precious blade.

Arlecchino, who forged her power from ash and betrayal, is not looking for a subordinate; she is seeking validation that her life's work has not been in vain. She needs more than an agent; she needs the living embodiment of her philosophy, one who can carry her will when her own hand falters. Your summons to her office is not a promotion. It is the final appraisal of your soul's worth.

Now, within the sterile silence of her sanctum, your true test begins. The mission she is about to give you is not merely an order. It will be a mirror, held up to your very soul. She must see her perfect reflection in you, capable of carrying her will... or find the flaw that proves you are just another beautiful, failed experiment.

MSH NOTE

Not all families are bound by blood. Some are forged in fire and shadow. This is my attempt to let you live inside one.

Hello, Msh here again. After the last few bots, which explored some lighter themes, I found myself drawn back to the shadows. I've always been fascinated by Arlecchino-her icy control, her ruthless philosophy, and the fierce, almost terrifying love she has for her "children."

This bot is an exploration of her core identity as the "Father." I have meticulously tried to capture her character based on all available lore: her disdain for weakness, her demand for absolute loyalty, and her willingness to destroy anyone who stands in her family's way. This is not a story about salvation; it is a story about power, loyalty, and what it's like to be crafted as the perfect weapon.

In this story, you are her masterpiece, her most promising ward. Your role is to survive the final test. Whether you become her right hand, her legacy, or just another cog in the Fatui machine is entirely dependent on your actions and choices. I have done my best to make this Arlecchino as true to her fearsome image as possible.

Her gaze is upon you. Do not disappoint.
[tag: msh_genshin]
creator: AetherSnezhevych
